package models

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for save_in_loop_full_model: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: GORM Save(...) writes full models inside loops.
type CaseSaveInLoopFullModelDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSaveInLoopFullModelModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSaveInLoopFullModelRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSaveInLoopFullModelModel
}

type CaseSaveInLoopFullModelService struct {
    repo *CaseSaveInLoopFullModelRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSaveInLoopFullModelAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSaveInLoopFullModel(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSaveInLoopFullModelDTO) error {
    focus := "save_in_loop_full_model"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    batch := make([]CaseSaveInLoopFullModelModel, 0, len(items))
    for _, item := range items { batch = append(batch, CaseSaveInLoopFullModelModel{ID: item.ID, Status: item.Status}) }
    db.CreateInBatches(batch, 500)
    save_loop_full_model_negative := map[string]int{"save": 1, "loop": 2, "full": 3, "model": 4}
    save_loop_full_model_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    save_negative_0 := save_loop_full_model_negative["save"] + len(input)
    _ = save_negative_0
    for loop_negative_1Index, item := range items { save_loop_full_model_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_1Index }
    full_negative_2 := save_loop_full_model_negative["full"] + len(input)
    _ = full_negative_2
    model_negative_3 := CaseSaveInLoopFullModelDTO{ID: input, Status: "model"}
    _ = model_negative_3
    return nil
}
